title: Item Alchemy Additions
description: A high-performance expansion for Item Alchemy, featuring new ways to obtain and spend EMC with ultimate item management
body:
# 💎 Item Alchemy Additions

**The ultimate upgrade for your transmutation experience!**

Are you tired of scrolling through dozens of pages to find a single item? Do you want a UI that is as intelligent and efficient as your alchemy? **Alchemical Tome** is a high-polish expansion for the *Item Alchemy* mod, redesigned from the ground up to provide the best user experience possible.

---

### ✨ Key Features

* 🔍 **Integrated Search Bar**: Find any item instantly by its name or ID. No more manual searching!
* 🌓 **Smart Visual Dimming**: Items you haven't learned yet are elegantly dimmed (60% transparency), making it crystal clear what is available to buy and what you still need to discover.
* 🗂️ **Advanced Filtering**: Toggle between views to see *All Items*, *Known*, *Unknown*, or those with *No EMC* value.
* 📊 **Flexible Sorting**: Organize your transmutation grid by EMC value (Ascending/Descending), Alphabetically, or by internal ID.
* 🛡️ **No-EMC Indicators**: Items without alchemical value are marked with a clear overlay, preventing confusion.
* 🖱️ **Scrollable Tabs**: Effortlessly navigate through Item Groups with a smooth, scrollable tab system—perfect for large modpacks!

---

### 🛠️ Technical Excellence & Performance

This isn't just a visual upgrade. As a developer focused on quality, I've ensured that the **Mk2** version is more stable and faster than the original:

* **Zero-Lag Sync**: Utilizing the latest `syncS2C` API for instant updates between client and server.
* **Virtual Handling**: We have removed "physical" slots from the interface. Learning and burning items is now a purely virtual, lag-free process, eliminating "ghost item" bugs.
* **Optimized Code**: Built for Fabric with performance in mind to ensure your FPS stays high even with thousands of items.

> ### 🤝 Collaboration with Pitan76
> This project was made possible with the direct support of **MrPitan76**, the creator of *Item Alchemy*. He specifically updated and optimized the **MCPitanLib** (v3.6.5+) to ensure the Mk2 table runs with maximum stability.

---

### 🔥 Join the Alchemical Community!
Want to see what’s coming next? Join our official Discord server! It’s the best place to:
* 🛠️ **See Sneak Peeks**: Get exclusive looks at upcoming features like the *Create* integration.
* 💡 **Shape the Mod**: Share your suggestions directly with me and help decide the future of Mk2.
* 🆘 **Get Fast Support**: Got a bug? Our community and I are here to help you out.
* 🧪 **Chat with Alchemists**: Connect with other players and share your transmutation setups.

👉 **[Join Viko's Modding Lab on Discord](https://discord.gg/cn6bNVvm2B)**

---

### 📥 Installation & Requirements

To use this addon, you need to have the following installed:

1.  **Fabric Loader** (0.18.6 or newer)
2.  **Item Alchemy** (Original Mod)
3.  **MCPitanLib** (Version 3.6.3 or newer)

---

### ❤️ Support the Project

I am a new modder dedicated to bringing polished, high-quality experiences to the Minecraft community. If you enjoy my work and want to support the development of future features (like the upcoming *Skill Shop* where you'll be able to purchase powerful upgrades for your character using the EMC you've collected), consider buying me a coffee:

👉 **[Support me on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/vikotoya)**
